BatchDeletePrimaryNetworkCardAndAuxiliar.{clientToken}: Idempotency token, an ASCII string with a maximum length of 64 characters. See [Idempotency](BCC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
BatchDeletePrimaryNetworkCardAndAuxiliar.instanceId: The ID of the virtual machine instance.
BatchDeletePrimaryNetworkCardAndAuxiliar.privateIps: The list of IPv4/IPv6 addresses to be deleted.
